title: Workflow visualization (Graphviz DOT + JSON summary)
description: Generate DOT files for workflow visualization: artifacts as nodes grouped by kind, trace edges as dashed arrows, pipeline stages as colored nodes, gates as bold edges. New command: spec-graph visualize [--format dot|json] [--output file]. Also generates JSON summary of graph stats.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
